name: Monster Max
author: Poki
description: Monster Max is a fun and bouncy survival game where you merge little monsters to make it to the end of the game. Collect, merge and evolve up to 7 different monsters to battle it out in the forest. Can you make it all the way to the end? How to play Monster Max? Use WASD, ZQSD, the arrow keys, or your mouse to move around. On mobile, use you finger to drag the character where you want it to go. Who created Monster Max? Monster Max is created by Puya. Check out their other game on Poki: Tiny Towers ! How can I play Monster Max for free? You can play Monster Max for free on Poki. Can I play Monster Max on mobile devices and desktop? Monster Max can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
